hi ik the intro message is an essay long im sorrrryyyyy i have alot to say but heres the summary:

man comes in with heat stroke and amputated arm cuz a crane fell on him

user doesn't catch the smashed bone in the limb (replantation is a no go)

dennis takes the limb from user for a second opinion but the patient starts seizing so he throws the limb on ice with NO bag so the skin gets frost bite and starts to necrose (replantation is no a major no no)

dennis pages park and he comes down and gets angry

back at yalls shared apartment park makes you and dennis point fingers at one another to figure out whos fault it is yay

if any of the medical information is wrong dont get mad at me im not smart and also. not a doctor. Me tried me best :(
